Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Sylvan Riverseed]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Unsouled ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 14''' — The Sylvan Riverseed is the seed of a nascent Sylvan with water and other unidentified aspects.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 19''' — The Sylvan Riverseed is a rare little blue-flame spirit in a glass enclosure.}}

== Soulsmith ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 13''' — The Sylvan Riverseed is a humanoid Remnant the size of a finger made of flowing blue waves.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 13''' — The Sylvan Riverseed is made of madra imitating water.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 13''' — Lindon obtained the Sylvan Riverseed from the Heaven's Glory School.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 13''' — The Sylvan Riverseed is an entity that was thought to have a water aspect and was intended for someone with pure madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 17''' — Sylvan Riverseed is a creature playing in a tank.}}

== Blackflame ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 2''' — The Sylvan Riverseed is kept in a glass case.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 10''' — Sylvan Riverseeds are natural spirits born of accumulated vital aura.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 10''' — Sylvan Riverseeds form in places where aura is extremely strong and in perfect balance.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 10''' — Sylvan Riverseeds are malleable enough to be crafted into guardians, weapons, guides, elixirs, power sources, drudges, or expensive cocktails.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 14''' — The Sylvan Riverseed is an artifact that Lindon carries in a case.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 14''' — The Sylvan Riverseed was previously a translucent bright blue doll but transformed into a deep azure woman with long, flowing hair and a dress.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 14''' — The Sylvan Riverseed can be fed madra coins which dissolve upon reaching her.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 14''' — The Sylvan Riverseed's case has scripted glass and a flaw that allows it to be opened.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 14''' — The Sylvan Riverseed is a spirit that Lindon and Yerin have acquired.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 16''' — Sylvan Riverseed is a person Lindon tried to use to heal Orthos.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 19''' — The Sylvan Riverseed can pour liquid blue through madra channels to soothe them.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 20''' — The Sylvan Riverseed is a creature that can hop onto Lindon's shoulder.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 20''' — Sylvan Riverseed is a creature that can sit on a shoulder.}}

== Skysworn ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 6''' — Sylvan Riverseed's touch rebalanced and purified a girl's madra channels.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 7''' — Sylvan Riverseed has a glass case containing a tiny island.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 12''' — The Sylvan Riverseed's power can cleanse madra channels.}}

== Ghostwater ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 2''' — Little Blue is the Sylvan Riverseed.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 2''' — The Sylvan Riverseed is an item Lindon intends to pull from his pack.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 6''' — The Sylvan Riverseed makes a long, slow tone that sounds like a flute.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 9''' — The Sylvan Riverseed gives Orthos a worried look.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 11''' — The Sylvan Riverseed is a spirit that Lindon feeds with his pure core.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 15''' — Lindon carries a Sylvan Riverseed on his shoulder.}}

== Uncrowned ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 3''' — The Sylvan Riverseed is a creature that can be kept in a void key.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 5''' — Sylvan Riverseed is a type of creature.}}

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 9''' — Sylvan Riverseeds are found in an ancient forest glade.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 18''' — The Sylvan Riverseed provides power to Lindon.}}

== Bloodline ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 5''' — Unintelligent Sylvan Riverseeds can be used in Soulsmithing.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 5''' — Sylvan Riverseeds are plants that can dance on a person's face.}}

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 2''' — Lindon's Sylvan Riverseed has power similar to his own.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 7''' — Sylvan Riverseeds are forming by the pond.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 26''' — The Sylvan Riverseed is in human form and is contract-bound to Lindon.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
